name: Ramp Corporate Card
credit_required: Business credit (no personal credit check; no personal guarantee required for most businesses)

welcome_offer.description: $1,000 welcome bonus for new cardholders (via select referral/partner channels; no minimum spend required per The Points Guy). Standard Ramp may offer $200 bonus via partner channels. Note: Ramp's rewards structure changed in May 2024.

earning_rates.notes: Up to 1.5% cash back on all purchases with no category restrictions. Rate is variable — determined by company's creditworthiness and spending profile. As of May 2024, rewards rates are customized per cardholder rather than flat 1.5%.

other_benefits.name: Expense management
other_benefits.description: Built-in expense management software, automatic categorization, receipt capture

other_benefits.name: No personal guarantee
other_benefits.description: No personal credit check or personal guarantee required

other_benefits.name: Unlimited cards
other_benefits.description: Issue unlimited corporate cards to employees

other_benefits.name: Integrations
other_benefits.description: Direct integrations with QuickBooks, Xero, NetSuite, Sage, and other accounting software

other_benefits.name: Partner rewards
other_benefits.description: Access to over $350,000 in partner rewards and discounts through Ramp's network

notes: Ramp is a financial automation platform / corporate card aimed at businesses. No annual fee, no foreign transaction fees, no card replacement fees. Earns up to 1.5% cash back (rate varies). The $1,000 welcome bonus is available through certain channels and may require completing qualifying transactions. Ramp also offers a 2% APY on eligible business account funds. Not a consumer card.
